channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 loc567/loc567 (1583 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: loc567

📝 Repository: loc567/loc567

📄 Descrizione: loc567 是一款完全开源免费的纯网页端iOS模拟定位工具。在线体验地址：https://loc567.com

⭐ Stelle: 1583

🍴 Forks: 210

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-11T06:05:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-05T03:15:33Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 AmmarkoV/SAM3DBody-cpp (539 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AmmarkoV

📝 Repository: AmmarkoV/SAM3DBody-cpp

📄 Descrizione: Real-time 3D full-body reconstruction from a single camera, Multiperson BVH output, Pure C++ runtime, ONNX + ggml, 70-joint skeleton with hands.

⭐ Stelle: 539

🍴 Forks: 73

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: 3d-human-pose bvh computer-vision cpp cuda ggml motion-capture multi-person-pose-estimation onnx opengl pose-detection pose-estimation pose-tracking real-time sam-3d-body

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-24T08:12:55Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-22T05:09:49Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

item.title: 📝 Rompass/openc6-bios (279 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Rompass

📝 Repository: Rompass/openc6-bios

📄 Descrizione: An open-source RISC-V firmware platform for ESP32-C6(8MB Flash). Implements a BIOS/Payload architecture with a custom system call interface (ABI), independent LP-Core coprocessor management, and an anti-brick A/B OTA system.

⭐ Stelle: 279

🍴 Forks: 20

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: bios bootloader embedded esp-idf esp32-c6 firmware riscv

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-15T14:02:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-04T20:21:51Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 aimardcr/akane-injector (115 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: aimardcr

📝 Repository: aimardcr/akane-injector

📄 Descrizione: A kernel-assisted shared-library injector for Android. Loads any .so into a target process without ptrace, in-process dlopen, or visible traces in /proc/<pid>/maps. GKI 2.0 (Android 12-16).

⭐ Stelle: 115

🍴 Forks: 33

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: android anti-detection arm64 frida gki injection kernel-module ptrace-free

📜 Licenza: No license

item.title: 📝 ngai-jeremy/WeatherPaper (81 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ngai-jeremy

📝 Repository: ngai-jeremy/WeatherPaper

📄 Descrizione: WeatherPaper is a health and comfort-focused smart weather station designed around a 4.2-inch e-paper display and a custom PCB. Lasting over one year and a half on a single charge. Featured on XDA Developers!
